title: 教區之恥 明愛暗指示威造成社會動盪  取消應屆畢業禮

replies.msg:
Dear Graduate,

Congratulations on your graduation!

You will be delighted to know that we are sending your Certificate of Graduation by mail to your postal address in mid-January 2020. Please make sure that your postal address as shown in this letter is up-to-date. In case you have changed your address, please update us of your latest address via registry@cihe.edu.hk.

Because of the unforeseeable circumstances, we have to let you know that the 2019 Graduation Ceremony will not be held. To celebrate your accomplishments, we are offering you a free graduate photo-taking opportunity. For this arrangement, a coupon will be sent together with your Certificate of Graduation on which the relevant details will be indicated.

If you wish to borrow academic dress for photo-taking with your family and friends separately, simply make a request to us on 3702 4386 or via sao@cihe.edu.hk, and we will make necessary arrangements.

Wish you all the best in your future aspirations!


Student Affairs Office
呢間垃圾就入返老母閪啦
我睇段文，get 唔到標題個meaning 喎

replies.msg: 不如大家估下，明愛專上學院會否被裝修？
明愛呢個團體本身就係垃圾

林鄭曾任社會福利署署長，早就與社福機構包括明愛有所交流。其天主教傳統名校出身，港英時代在公務員系統內平步青雲，基本上就是殖民地價值的化身。如果梁振英代表土共「適度有位」、「搞鬥爭」，林鄭則代表殖民地時期「積極不干預」、「政商關係良好」等原則。因此，在林鄭的思維中，仍然認為政府不應負起太多責任，只需要提供所謂最低限度福利，維持所謂「自由市場」及「良好營商環境」，就是良策。（當然所謂「自由市場」乃靠積極干預以偏袒財團，此處不詳論。）此種思維，與教會保守板塊一拍即合。政府不去擴展社會福利制度，就由教會團體來做，政府在背後資助就可以了。教會從而繼續提供補救式（remedial）社會服務，對不公制度不聞不問。政府減少責任，教會又可藉此傳教，各取所需，一家便宜兩家著。

https://www.inmediahk.net/node/10386061
